armor_piercing_rounds.name: Armor Piercing Rounds

components.description: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance .

descriptions: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance .

sections.Notes: Armor Piercing Rounds does not damage enemies in Invincible state. Armor Piercing Rounds bypasses bullet evasion .
sections.Notable Interactions: Armor Piercing Rounds can allow the player's bullets to go through Kelvin 's Frozen Shelter and McGinnis ' Spectral Wall . Armor Piercing Rounds does not bypass Vyper 's Petrifying Bola .

capacitor.name: Capacitor

components.description: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.
Launch a projectile that deals damage , applies a strong slow that recovers over time, prevents Stamina usage and Silences their movement-based items and abilities .

descriptions: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.
Launch a projectile that deals damage , applies a strong slow that recovers over time, prevents Stamina usage and Silences their movement-based items and abilities .

sections.Notes: Capacitor has an internal cooldown of 0.25 seconds, which is lowered by item cooldown reduction. Shock Damage is considered Spirit Damage and is reduced by Spirit Resist.

crippling_headshot.name: Crippling Headshot

components.description: Landing a Headshot will reduce their Bullet and Spirit Resist and applies Healing Reduction .

descriptions: Landing a Headshot will reduce their Bullet and Spirit Resist and applies Healing Reduction .

sections.Notes: The headshot damage is applied first before the debuff, meaning that the initial headshot will not benefit from the bullet resist reduction
sections.Affected healing: Following abilities and items get their healing reduced by Crippling Headshot.

crushing_fists.name: Crushing Fists

components.description: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage .
Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned .

descriptions: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage .
Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned .

sections.Affected Abilities: Some abilities scale with melee damage and are affected by this item's increase to Melee Damage . Moreover, several abilities use heavy melee scaling and will benefit from Crushing Fists' unique passive effect as well. This is an automatic list. Click here to add notes or correct the contents. Calico Leaping Slash ×0.8 — Drifter Rend ×1.2 T3 upgrade changes scaling to ×0.55 of Heavy Melee damage. Can be parried. Yamato Flying Slash ×1 —

frenzy.name: Frenzy

components.description: While you are below 50% health , you gain stat bonuses for a duration and existing debuffs on you are reduced.

descriptions: While you are below 50% health , you gain stat bonuses for a duration and existing debuffs on you are reduced.

glass_cannon.name: Glass Cannon

components.description: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

descriptions: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

lucky_shot.name: Lucky Shot

components.description: Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit. Bonus damage cannot Crit.

descriptions: Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit. Bonus damage cannot Crit.

sections.Notes: The Bonus Damage is based on the total bullet damage and is not a Weapon Damage bonus. Headshot damage is considered a crit and is not taken into account for the bonus damage calculation (the lucky damage cannot crit and does the same bonus damage no matter where you hit). Lucky Shot is immune to Bullet Evasion .

ricochet.name: Ricochet

components.description: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

descriptions: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

sections.Notes: Bullet based procs and effects are applied to ricocheted shots. Bullets do not bounce off of objectives.

shadow_weave.name: Shadow Weave

components.description: Become Stealthed . Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.
Attacking or using an ability will end your stealth and start an ambush , temporarily granting you bonus Fire Rate , Spirit Power and Melee Damage .

descriptions: Become Stealthed . Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.
Attacking or using an ability will end your stealth and start an ambush , temporarily granting you bonus Fire Rate , Spirit Power and Melee Damage .

sections.Melee damage abilities: Some abilities scale with melee damage and are affected by Shadow Weave's increase to Melee Damage . This is an automatic list. Click here to add notes or correct the contents. Hero Ability Light Melee Scaling Notes Bebop Exploding Uppercut ×1 — Bebop Grapple Arm ×0.7 — Billy Bashdown ×1.1 T3 upgrade changes scaling to ×0.6 of Heavy Melee damage. Calico Leaping Slash ×0.8 — Drifter Rend ×1.2 T3 upgrade changes scaling to ×0.55 of Heavy Melee damage. Silver Boot Kick ×0.9 — Silver (Transformed) Go For The Throat ×1.5 — Silver (Transformed) Mauling Leap ×1.5 — Viscous Puddle Punch ×0.6 T3 upgrade changes scaling to ×0.6 of Heavy Melee damage. Can be parried. Yamato Flying Slash ×1 —
sections.Notes: Targeted abilities such as Mo & Krill 's Combo and Curse 's active effect still work as normal on heroes in stealth. The increase in fire rate after ending stealth is gradual, increasing to to the full 30% after about half a second.
sections.Trivia: Most heroes have voice lines for activating Shadow Weave, but they are not enabled in-game.

silencer.name: Silencer

components.description: Your bullets reduce the target's outgoing spirit damage .
Your bullets build up to a Silence . Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.

descriptions: Your bullets reduce the target's outgoing spirit damage .
Your bullets build up to a Silence . Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.

sections.Notes: Silencer's Damage Reduction Debuff effect on Spirit Damage will apply to enemy players with Unstoppable activated; But only the Damage Debuff portion is applied, the Silenced aspect will not take effect.
sections.Buildup Per Shot: The item has a different buildup per shot depending on which hero purchased the item. The status only triggers once a buildup reaches 100% on an enemy player, and the buildup decays back to 0 if an enemy hasn't been shot for some time. Melee attacks count as 1 shot. Once Silenced, subsequent shots have no effect until the victim's immunity expires. spellslinger.name: Spellslinger

components.description: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

descriptions: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

spiritual_overflow.name: Spiritual Overflow

components.description: Gain bonus Fire Rate , Spirit Power and Spirit Lifesteal by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

descriptions: Gain bonus Fire Rate , Spirit Power and Spirit Lifesteal by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

sections.Buildup Per Shot: The item has a different buildup per shot depending on which hero purchased the item. The Overflow status only triggers once a buildup reaches 100% on an enemy player, and the buildup decays back to 0 if an enemy hasn't been shot for some time. Melee attacks count as 1 shot. Once Overflowing, subsequent shots do not buildup or trigger another Overflow until the current Overflow expires. sections.Trivia: Spiritual Overflow's icon displays the optical illusion known as Rubin Vase .

cheat_death.name: Cheat Death

components.description: When you would take lethal damage, instead become temporarily death immune and remove all non-stun debuffs . While death immune, you deal reduced damage and have reduced healing .

descriptions: When you would take lethal damage, instead become temporarily death immune and remove all non-stun debuffs . While death immune, you deal reduced damage and have reduced healing .

sections.Overview: When the player triggers Cheat Death, a visual effect of a scythe and a contract that reads "Savor your moments, cheat the end, but remember - Death always collects what is owed" appears above the player's head.
sections.Notable Interactions: The Rejuvenator credit is triggered after Cheat Death. Victor 's Shocking Reanimation is triggered before Cheat Death. An exception is for Shiv 's Killing Blow , which will trigger Shocking Reanimation and Cheat Death at the same time. This is likely unintentional.
sections.Affected healing: Following abilities and items get their healing reduced by Cheat Death.
sections.Trivia: Cheat Death has the same name and similar effect to one of the abilities of the unreleased hero Rutger . Cheat Death's icon has been redesigned multiple times: Originally it showed a hand holding 5 aces in a poker game against Death, then as a person kicking the door of a coffin, and currently is a hand holding 5 aces including a skull suit.

descriptions: Grow larger in size , gaining bullet resist , spirit resist , and melee damage . Nearby enemies suffer from slow and have reduced dash speed .

divine_barrier.name: Divine Barrier

components.description: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed . Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

descriptions: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed . Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

diviners_kevlar.name: Diviners Kevlar

components.description: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power .

descriptions: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power .

sections.Notes: The spirit scaling buff from Diviner's Kevlar has some inconsistent interactions. For example: Abrams ' Siphon Life and Shoulder Charge will use the current spirit power when the ability does damage. Bebop 's Sticky Bomb will benefit from the bonus spirit power even if Diviner's Kevlar expires before the bomb explodes, as long as the bomb was applied prior to it expiring. Infernus ' Flame Dash will also reflect the current spirit power bonus when the ability does damage.

healing_tempo.name: Healing Tempo

components.description: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed . Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

descriptions: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed . Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

sections.Notes: The bonus fire rate applies to allied McGinnis ' Mini Turret s, but not allied Troopers .
sections.Amplified sources of healing: Following abilities and items get their healings amplified by Healing Tempo.

phantom_strike.name: Phantom Strike

components.description: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage , Move speed reduction and Disarm .

descriptions: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage , Move speed reduction and Disarm .

sections.Notes: When activated, there is a short animation and delay before the hero is teleported.

plated_armor.name: Plated Armor

components.description: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

descriptions: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

sections.Notes: The chance for Deflection and On-hit Prevention is rolled individually, although Deflection will prevent most effects that On-hit prevention does. They can both trigger at the same time. This is most evident when testing Headhunter against Plated Armor. If a bullet is deflected, it will fly off in a different direction, maintaining its damaging capability.
sections.Interactions: Note: Anything missing from this list has not been tested, and, therefore, may, or may not, be affected by Plated Armor.
sections.Weapons: Blocked by both Deflection and On-Hit Prevention: Spreadshot weapons ( ): Triggers at once for all pellets. All pellets are deflected as though they are a single shot. Burst weapons ( ): Applied per bullet. Celeste : When deflected, an extra projectile is created. The original projectile can ricochet, as normal, and a new projectile is shot out in a random direction. The new projectile also ricochets. Graves : When deflected, it does not ricochet, although a visual bug might appear where a bullet projectile is created. This bullet cannot hit enemies. Paige : When deflected, an extra projectile is created. The original projectile pierces, as normal, and a new projectile is shot out in a random direction.
sections.Abilities: Effects blocked by both Deflection and On-Hit Prevention: Billy - Blasted bonus bullet damage amp Celeste - Light Eater on-hit spirit damage Graves - Essence Theft Grey Talon - Rain of Arrows : Triggers at once for all arrows. All arrows are deflected as though they are a single shot. Haze - Fixation : Stack buildup Holliday Crackshot : Cooldown is not applied when blocked. Infernus - Afterburn : Buildup Mina - Love Bites : Buildup and spirit damage on bullet hits Seven - Power Surge : The chaining damage is blocked per bullet and the opportunity to apply is not consumed when blocked. Effects partially blocked: Venator - Ira Domini 's Weapon damage can be deflected, but not the pure damage. Wraith - Card Trick : Buildup blocked by Deflection. Effects that are not blocked: Mirage - Djinn's Mark Paradox - Kinetic Carbine Silver - Slam Fire bonus current health damage. Sinclair - Spectral Assistant Venator - Consecrating Grenade and Gutshot deal weapon damage but cannot be deflected. Vindicta - Flight on-hit spirit damage. Wraith - Full Auto on-hit spirit damage.
sections.Items: Effects blocked by both Deflection and On-Hit Prevention: Point Blank : Slowing debuff Ricochet : When blocked, the bullet will never chain, or will be prevented from chaining to any more targets. Siphon Bullets : Even when blocked, Siphon Bullets will still go on cooldown. Spirit Shredder Bullets / Spirit Rend Stalker : Will not go on cooldown when blocked. Slowing Bullets / Toxic Bullets / Silencer / Inhibitor / Spiritual Overflow : Buildup Effects partially blocked: Headshot Booster / Headhunter : Blocked by On-Hit Prevention. Always go on cooldown, even when blocked. Lucky Shot : Blocked by Deflection. Split Shot : Blocked by Deflection. Effects that are not blocked: Armor Piercing Rounds counters Plated Armor, causing bullets to hit and apply their effects. Since both items are chance based, Plated Armor may still block bullets when Armor Piercing Rounds does not trigger. Burst Fire Crippling Headshot / Weakening Headshot Escalating Resilience Hollow Point Mercurial Magnum Mystic Shot Restorative Shot Tesla Bullets / Capacitor

siphon_bullets.name: Siphon Bullets

components.description: Your bullets temporarily steal Max HP from enemies. Enemies regain their stolen health when the debuff expires.

descriptions: Your bullets temporarily steal Max HP from enemies. Enemies regain their stolen health when the debuff expires.

sections.Notes: Shooting an enemy hero deals 2.5% max HP damage and applies the Siphon Bullets debuff, which reduces the target's max HP by the amount of damage dealt, and increases the user's max HP while healing them by the same amount. The max HP steal lasts for 17 seconds (affected by Debuff Resist ), refreshes on subsequent applications, and stacks infinitely. Stealing max HP from an enemy places the effect on a 1.2s cooldown (affected by Item Cooldown Reduction ). Each application will steal up to 2.5% max HP from afflicted targets, but the amount siphoned is reduced with falloff and the flat damage dealt may interact with certain passives. The damage dealt by Siphon Bullets cannot be increased or decreased by Bullet Resist, Spirit Resist, or damage amplification ( Pocket 's Barrage or Escalating Exposure ). Shiv 's Bloodletting passive will reduce the flat damage dealt by Siphon Bullets, but Shiv will still lose 2.5% max HP per application. The damage dealt by Siphon Bullets will still trigger Abrams ' Infernal Resilience regeneration passive. The damage dealt by Siphon Bullets does not proc item effects. Siphon Bullets does not trigger if the initial bullet deals 0 damage. Siphon Bullets can not be applied on multiple targets by Ricochet due to its 1.2s cooldown, only the initial target will receive the debuff. Due to the max HP steal being based on the current max HP, which decreases after each proc, the damage dealt decays exponentially, meaning subsequent applications deal less damage. Siphon Bullets' current and max HP increase for its user can proc Healing Tempo , but is not affected by healing reduction. For each instance of max HP steal on an enemy, the user gains the same amount of max HP, equal to the stolen health. When an enemy has their max HP steal duration refreshed, the whole amount of max HP that was gained from that enemy also has its duration refreshed. If max HP has been gained from multiple enemies, refreshing the steal duration on one enemy will only re
sections.Trivia: Before the March 6, 2026 update, Siphon Bullets could permanently steal Max HP on hero kill, with the killer losing the stolen health if they died. This allowed a player to get "negative health" and become unkillable by dying multiple times under the effect of Siphon Bullets.

unstoppable.name: Unstoppable

components.description: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm . Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept .

descriptions: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm . Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept .

sections.Notes: Unstoppable is not usable when the player loses control of their character, such as when asleep or stunned. Instead, it should be used in anticipation of these abilities to prevent them from working. Status Effects such as Anti-heal and Damage Debuffs (such as those applied from Inhibitor and Silencer ) are NOT suppressed. Channelled abilities such as Dynamo 's Singularity will affect the hero if Unstoppable's active ends while the ability is still ongoing. Unstoppable's active ability does not prevent damage from enemies, even if it prevents the negative effects. Although not explicitly mentioned in its description, the usage of Unstoppable also grants the user immunity to the Interrupt status effect. Unstoppable is not removed by Cursed Relic and blocks all of it's effects, including the removal of non-ultimate buffs.
sections.Interactions with Crowd-Control: While Unstoppable cannot be activated while stunned, slept, on cooldown, or similar, the Debuff Resist passive reduces the duration of effects inflicted by the following abilities: This is an automatic list. Click here to add notes or correct the contents. Abrams : Shoulder Charge , Seismic Impact Apollo : Disengaging Sigil , Riposte Bebop : Exploding Uppercut , Grapple Arm (T1 debuff), Hyper Beam (effect is negligible) Billy : Bashdown , Blasted Celeste : Light Eater , Dazzling Trick , Shining Wonder Drifter : Rend (T3 debuff), Stalker's Mark Dynamo : Kinetic Pulse Graves : Jar of Dead , Grasping Hands , Borrowed Decree Grey Talon : Rain of Arrows , Spirit Snare , Guided Owl Haze : Sleep Dagger , Fixation Holliday : Powder Keg , Crackshot , Spirit Lasso Infernus : Napalm , Afterburn , Concussive Combustion Ivy : Entangling Thorns , Stone Form , Air Drop Kelvin : Frost Grenade Lady Geist : Life Drain , Malice , Soul Exchange (cast micro-slow + T2 silence) Lash : Ground Strike , Flog (T1 slow), Death Slam McGinnis : Mini Turret , Spectral Wall , Heavy Barrage (T1 slow + dash slow) Mina : Love Bites , Nox Nostra Mirage : Fire Scarabs , Dust Devil , Djinn's Mark Mo & Krill : Scorn (T3 debuff), Burrow , Sand Blast (T2 slow + dash slow), Combo Paige : Captivating Read , Rallying Charge Paradox : Pulse Grenade , Time Wall , Kinetic Carbine Pocket : Barrage , Enchanter's Satchel , Affliction Rem : Pillow Toss , Naptime Seven : Lightning Ball (effect is negligible), Static Charge (stun duration only), Power Surge (T3 debuff) Shiv : Serrated Knives , Slice and Dice Silver : Boot Kick (T3 debuff), Entangling Bola Silver (Transformed) : Mauling Leap , Tail Whack Sinclair : Vexing Bolt (T1 debuff), Rabbit Hex The Doorman : Call Bell , Luggage Cart (T3 stun), Hotel Guest (post-checkout Time-Slow + T2 stun) Venator : Consecrating Grenade , Gutshot , Hex-Lined Snap Trap Victor : Pain Battery (T1 slow), Aura of Suffering (T1 slow, T3 debuff; effect is negligible), Shocking Reanimat
sections.Trivia: The Unstoppable icon is similar to a depiction of Doctor Manhattan , a powerful blue-skinned superhero from the comic book Watchmen .

vampiric_burst.name: Vampiric Burst

components.description: Grants Lifesteal , Fire Rate , and Ammo . This added Ammo is not limited by your max magazine size.

descriptions: Grants Lifesteal , Fire Rate , and Ammo . This added Ammo is not limited by your max magazine size.

sections.Hero Abilities: Abilities that deal weapon damage also provide heal from Bullet Lifesteal. Here are all of the relevant abilities. This is an automatic list. Click here to add notes or correct the contents. Hero Ability Venator Consecrating Grenade Venator Gutshot Venator Ira Domini
sections.Trivia: Vampiric Burst appears to have previously been named "Surging Power", as many hero voice lines for it are named "use_surging_power" and heroes will often say it when Vampiric Burst is activated. Additionally, Lash's in-game voice lines for Vampiric Burst are "lash_use_surging_power", while another set of unused lines named "lash_use_vampiric_burst" also exist. Venator 's Ira Domini and Gutshot T3 heavy melee deal +5 damage to enemies with Vampiric Burst active.

witchmail.name: Witchmail

components.description: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown .

descriptions: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown .

arctic_blast.name: Arctic Blast

components.description: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage , Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Slowed targets have their stamina regen frozen

descriptions: Release an expanding ice blast that deals spirit damage , Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Slowed targets have their stamina regen frozen

sections.Notes: Currently, it is the only item that gives you a percentage of your current Spirit Power.

cursed_relic.name: Cursed Relic

components.description: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming , and preventing item usage . Removes all non-ultimate buffs .

descriptions: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming , and preventing item usage . Removes all non-ultimate buffs .

sections.Hero ability buffs removed by Cursed Rel: “If we are to complete the ritual, we must think clearly.” This page may contain factual inaccuracies . The information presented requires verification against reliable sources. Issue: List may be outdated Abrams - Siphon Life , Shoulder Charge bonus weapon damage. Bebop - Exploding Uppercut bonus weapon damage and gun range, Sticky Bomb on Bebop's teammates. Billy - Rising Ram , weapon damage, Blasted Calico - Ava , Leaping Slash The Doorman - Doorway barrier Drifter - Stalker's Mark ambush fire rate Dynamo Quantum Entanglement fire rate, Rejuvenating Aurora (removes healing and if not upgraded to T3, the ability to dash) Grey Talon - Rain of Arrows (knocks out of sky) Haze - Smoke Bomb (does not affect her outside detection range) Holliday - Bounce Pad stomp damage and air control Infernus - Flame Dash Ivy - Kudzu Connection , Air Drop (knocks out of the sky) Kelvin - Ice Path Lash - Grapple fire rate and damage Mirage - Fire Scarabs max health, Tornado bullet evasion. Mo & Krill - Burrow bullet and spirit resist, disables damage if hit while spinning Paige - Plot Armor Paradox - Kinetic Carbine Pocket - Barrage stacks Seven - Power Surge Shiv - Slice and Dice Sinclair - Spectral Assistant fire rate Victor - Jumpstart move speed, Aura of Suffering Vindicta - Flight spirit damage Viscous - The Cube itself and its bonus move speed and stamina recovery. Warden - Willpower Wraith - Project Mind , Full Auto Yamato - Flying Strike damage
sections.Item buffs removed by Cursed Relic: Removes all barriers from any item or ability Active Reload Fleetfoot move speed Kinetic Dash fire rate Berserker stacks Blood Tribute (can be toggled back on) Escalating Resilience stacks Heroic Aura fire rate Silencer (Removes debuff application immunity early) Shadow Weave fire rate and spirit power Spellslinger stacks Spiritual Overflow Rebuttal bonus melee damage Healing Nova Return Fire (does not stop the player from taking damage from Return Fire) Counterspell (damage only) Dispel Magic slowing effect Fury Trance Majestic Leap barrier Metal Skin Rescue Beam (disables healing of the target and they cannot be pulled) Veil Walker Warp Stone bullet resist Cheat Death Colossus Divine Barrier Diviner's Kevlar Healing Tempo Infuser Siphon Bullets (stacks can be gained back from shooting) Vampiric Burst Arcane Surge spirit power (if the player uses an ability) Quicksilver Reload Ethereal Shift Mercurial Magnum Surge of Power Magic Carpet (disables while flying on carpet) Scourge
sections.Notes: Cursed Relic does not remove the Unstoppable status, and does not remove buffs from Unstoppable targets. The Curse status does not disable passive effects. This means the player can still activate Counterspell , since it's a passive effect applied to parrying.
sections.Trivia: This item was previously named Curse .

escalating_exposure.name: Escalating Exposure

components.description: Dealing spirit damage applies a stacking Spirit Amp that increases your spirit damage to the target.

descriptions: Dealing spirit damage applies a stacking Spirit Amp that increases your spirit damage to the target.

sections.Notes: Unlike its component Mystic Vulnerability , the amplified damage from Escalating Exposure is a separate instance of damage, applied after the original spirit damage. This has implications for abilities or effects that rely on single instances of damage, such as Tankbuster . This still applies even if the teammate also has Escalating Exposure. The user that most recently started applying stacks' icon will be the only one shown to the entire team. The user with stacks applied to them will only see the combined total of Escalating Exposure stacks on them, not each player's individual count.

ethereal_shift.name: Ethereal Shift

components.description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist . Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

descriptions: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist . Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

sections.Notes: During Ethereal Shift, caster can only float around slowly at 3 m/s. Caster does not fall if mid-air. The caster can still turn their camera and character. Casting Ethereal Shift does not reset jump/dash, even if mid-air when cast. Casting Ethereal Shift cancels any abilities currently being channeled.
sections.Trivia: This item was previously named Shifting Shroud .

focus_lens.name: Focus Lens

components.description: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

descriptions: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

sections.Notes: Removing Focus Lens with Debuff Remover or purge abilities still deals damage.

lightning_scroll.name: Lightning Scroll

components.description: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay.

descriptions: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay.

sections.Notes: The " Mystic Slow effects " listed in the tooltip include the -12% Dash Distance Reduction, though it's not directly listed in the item description. This is mentioned in the January 30, 2026 patch notes. Drifter , Kelvin , Mirage , Pocket , and Yamato cannot buy Lightning Scroll, as their ultimates cannot trigger its passive effect. Lady Geist 's ultimate does not trigger Lightning Scroll, though she can still buy it. This may be an unintended interaction of Geist's ult only dealing Pure Damage . (However, Lightning Scroll does trigger for ultimates that deal Pure Damage on a low health threshold, such as Shiv 's Killing Blow , if the player survives with Cheat Death or similar effect). Damage dealt by Silver 's Weapon or Abilities while transformed will trigger Lightning Scroll.

magic_carpet.name: Magic Carpet

components.description: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

descriptions: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

sections.Trivia: Magic Carpet was inspired by a forum post by user @pesquerart . [ 1 ] If Mirage buys Magic Carpet, the Shopkeeper says it's "a little on the nose". [ 2 ]

mercurial_magnum.name: Mercurial Magnum

components.description: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , bonus fire rate , and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus spirit damage based on your Spirit Power.

descriptions: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage , bonus fire rate , and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus spirit damage based on your Spirit Power.

sections.Notes: Mercurial Magnum is a Charge-Up item, so it's not affected by Cooldown Reduction . The passive buff has a fixed duration of 12 seconds.

mystic_reverb.name: Mystic Reverb

components.description: Imbue an ability with Lifesteal and to apply slow on a hit target and deal an additional percentage of the damage dealt to enemies around the target after a short delay.

descriptions: Imbue an ability with Lifesteal and to apply slow on a hit target and deal an additional percentage of the damage dealt to enemies around the target after a short delay.

sections.Notes: The debuff effect is applied to the first enemy hit. If the imbued ability is an area-of-effect and it hits multiple heroes, only one enemy will receive the debuff.
sections.Notable Interactions: Pure Damage does not trigger the reverb or use the imbued lifesteal. If an ability has bonus Pure Damage like the blessed stakes of Venator 's Ira Domini , it will not be used to calculate the damage of the reverb. Mystic Reverb can be imbued on Lady Geist 's Soul Exchange , but it has no effect. Abilities that only deal Melee Damage such as Viscous ' Puddle Punch or Calico 's Leaping Slash can be imbued, though they cannot activate the reverb or use the imbued lifesteal. Spirit Snatch applies after the melee damage and does not allow melee abilities to use Mystic Reverb. However, Quicksilver Reload and Mercurial Magnum grant bonus spirit damage to the imbued ability's first hit of weapon or spirit damage and can activate the debuff. The debuff can store damage from items like Quicksilver Reload or Tankbuster on the imbued ability. The 50% extra damage is calculated based on pre-mitigation damage, but can then still be mitigated by spirit resistance when it triggers.
sections.Known Bugs: The initial reverb damage can kill the primary target, but is sometimes non-lethal to secondary targets, leaving them with at least 1 hp remaining. This seems to mainly happen against Target Dummies in Sandbox

scourge.name: Scourge

components.description: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

descriptions: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

spirit_burn.name: Spirit Burn

components.description: Dealing significant spirit damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

descriptions: Dealing significant spirit damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

sections.Affected healing: Following abilities and items get their healing reduced by Spirit Burn.

transcendent_cooldown.name: Transcendent Cooldown

components.description: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

descriptions: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

sections.Notes: When bought, Cooldown Reduction is applied retroactively to abilities already on cooldown. It reduces all item cooldowns, for both passive and active effects. It does not affect Charge-Up items, such as Tankbuster and Mercurial Magnum .

vortex_web.name: Vortex Web

components.description: Throw a vacuum grenade, pulling all enemies into a small area and applying Slowing Hex . Alt Cast to Target Unit Directly.

descriptions: Throw a vacuum grenade, pulling all enemies into a small area and applying Slowing Hex . Alt Cast to Target Unit Directly.

sections.Notes: Vortex Web can be cast at a target enemy player, pulling other enemies towards them. The Vortex Web model is an octopus that pulls players with its arms.
sections.Trivia: Developer Hopoo has joked on Discord that the Vortex Web octopus and Viscous "went to the same high school". [ 1 ]
